- **Payment Terms**: Payment method and terms will be discussed upon order confirmation.
- **Validity**: Please confirm the order within 7 days for validity of quoted prices.
Thank you for considering us for your needs related to the upcoming ceremony! Let us know if you have any further questions or adjustments.
